description: Easy task: detect obvious single-document protocol deviations.

cases.objective: Flag missing informed consent before screening.
cases.protocol_excerpt: Section 2.1: Written informed consent must be signed before any trial-specific screening procedure.

patient_records.notes: CBC and ECG completed at screening visit.

cases.objective: Flag visit window violation for Week 4 safety review.
cases.protocol_excerpt: Section 5.4: Week 4 follow-up visit must occur within plus or minus 3 days from Day 28.

patient_records.notes: Visit completed on Day 39 due to site staffing issue.

cases.protocol_excerpt: Section 7.2: Systemic corticosteroids are prohibited during the treatment period unless approved as emergency rescue.
